exercises.title: Build a Blog API with RESTful Routes
exercises.description: Create a complete REST API for a blog with Users, Posts, and Comments. Implement full CRUD operations, proper status codes, and error handling.

exercises.title: Implement Advanced Filtering and Sorting
exercises.description: Enhance the blog API to support advanced filtering, sorting, and field selection. Allow users to filter posts by date range, search by title, and sort by different fields.

exercises.title: Create API Documentation with OpenAPI
exercises.description: Document your REST API using OpenAPI/Swagger specification. Create a swagger.json file that describes all endpoints, parameters, and responses.

summary: These exercises cover building RESTful APIs with proper resource design, advanced filtering/sorting, and API documentation. They demonstrate practical patterns for production-ready REST APIs.
